TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Bob Brown sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1923 , ryax sa tay 12 nqu tay 11, Bob Brown, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 2016) pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players qyanux na sraral Bob Brown byaqan na ryax maki Oberon, New South Wales. trang mqwas biru ga galan nha mqbaq biru mrhuw. tmasot mqwas biru musa hopa pqwasan biru. 1972 kawas wal maki Tasmania la. suruw pincwagan nya ga hopa na pkita nbu sinsiy beh Launceston. sangka' mtasiq na sinqqas mruw msqun mlahang cinbwanan.
S.PHON: βoβ βrown s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa. kawas~ɕ taj **** , rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj **, βoβ βrown, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. (mħuqil s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) pinʦ~ʨjuwaɣan njaʔ ps~ɕpŋan mari s~ɕa maj juɣal jaʦ~ʨiŋ ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ qjanux na s~ɕraral βoβ βrown βjaqan na rjax maki oβeron, new s~ɕoutħ wales~ɕ. traŋ mqwas~ɕ βiru ɣa ɣalan nħa mqβaq βiru mrħuw. tmas~ɕot mqwas~ɕ βiru mus~ɕa ħopa pqwas~ɕan βiru. **** kawas~ɕ wal maki tas~ɕmania la. s~ɕuruw pinʦ~ʨwaɣan nja ɣa ħopa na pkita nβu s~ɕins~ɕij βeħ launʦ~ʨes~ɕton. s~ɕaŋkaʔ mtas~ɕiq na s~ɕinqqas~ɕ mruw ms~ɕqun mlaħaŋ ʦ~ʨinβwanan.
S.FORM: Bob Brown sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1923 , ryax sa tay 12 nqu tay 11, Bob Brown, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 2016) pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players qyanux na sraral Bob Brown byaqan na ryax maki Oberon, New South Wales. trang mqwas biru ga galan nha mqbaq biru mrhuw. tmasot mqwas biru musa hopa pqwasan biru. 1972 kawas wal maki Tasmania la. suruw pincwagan nya ga hopa na pkita nbu sinsiy beh Launceston. sangka' mtasiq na sinqqas mruw msqun mlahang cinbwanan.
S.PHON: βoβ βrown s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa. kawas~ɕ taj **** , rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj **, βoβ βrown, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. (mħuqil s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) pinʦ~ʨjuwaɣan njaʔ ps~ɕpŋan mari s~ɕa maj juɣal jaʦ~ʨiŋ ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ qjanux na s~ɕraral βoβ βrown βjaqan na rjax maki oβeron, new s~ɕoutħ wales~ɕ. traŋ mqwas~ɕ βiru ɣa ɣalan nħa mqβaq βiru mrħuw. tmas~ɕot mqwas~ɕ βiru mus~ɕa ħopa pqwas~ɕan βiru. **** kawas~ɕ wal maki tas~ɕmania la. s~ɕuruw pinʦ~ʨwaɣan nja ɣa ħopa na pkita nβu s~ɕins~ɕij βeħ launʦ~ʨes~ɕton. s~ɕaŋkaʔ mtas~ɕiq na s~ɕinqqas~ɕ mruw ms~ɕqun mlaħaŋ ʦ~ʨinβwanan.
